parameters.query:
WITH up AS (
  INSERT INTO hr_disciplinary_assistant.hr_checklist_answers AS a
    (chat_id, scenario, item, done, comment, updated_at)
  SELECT $2::text, $3::text, r.item, r.done, r.comment, now()
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) AS r(item TEXT, done BOOLEAN, comment TEXT)
  ON CONFLICT (chat_id, item) DO UPDATE SET
    scenario = EXCLUDED.scenario,
    done = EXCLUDED.done,
    comment = EXCLUDED.comment,
    updated_at = now()
  RETURNING 1
)
SELECT count(*)::int AS saved FROM up;

parameters.jsCode:
const saved = $input.first().json.saved || 0;
return [{ json: { saved: true, count: saved } }];
